response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced Senior Software Developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and extensive expertise may exceed the requirements for a junior/mid-level role. His skills align well with the technical stack (TypeScript, React, databases), but his career trajectory suggests he may seek more responsibility than this position offers.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, directly matching the required skills.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating multiple data sources, relevant to the role's responsibilities.
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling, demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, which may lead to misaligned expectations or early turnover.
Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (preferred database) or Nest.js, though related skills are present.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current senior-level flexibility or remote work preferences.
